hardhat compile edit test/Fee.t.sol.prepare: git checkout -- test/Fee.t.sol && npx hardhat compile
hardhat compile edit test/Fee.t.sol.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/Fee.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

hardhat compile edit src/SwapVM.sol.prepare: git checkout -- src/SwapVM.sol && npx hardhat compile
hardhat compile edit src/SwapVM.sol.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> src/SwapVM.sol && npx hardhat compile
